title: When a contact is created in outlook.com, how do I sync to monday.com as an item? (except make / zapier)
excerpt:
Hello, most of the marketplace solutions are to sync calendar and email, what if I just want to sync outlook contacts (1-way is good enough) to monday.com? 
Thank You!

posts.author: kelvin_cmhahk (Kelvin)
